of funds, the subpoena contains a
clause at the bottom, signed by F.
X. McBroom, chairman of the
board of county commissioners, as.
surfing him that Spokane county
will bear his expenses. should he
come here. The former subpoena
contained this same provision. and
as Hill failed to come it is pre-
sumed that he will likewise disre,
gard the order In the present in
stane.


In addition to Louis Hill, e. Saw
yer, treasurer of the Great North
ern; John G.. Drew, comptroller.
and w. r. Begg, solicitor, were sub
poenaed to appear before the grand
jury. All of the subpoenas con-
tanned requests that certain records
and papers connected with the
Sparrow case, the two Stevens
county tax cases, the three cases
of the United States against the
Great Northern ana the Frost Cop.
case, be produced before the grand
jury.
